intro: Lovingly designed coloring book full of child-friendly dinosaur illustrations
description:
Animal Coloring Books for Kids & Toddlers – Dinosaurs is a lovingly designed coloring book full of child-friendly dinosaur illustrations.

The game can be played directly on the device’s touchscreen using a finger. Children simply tap, paint, and get creative!

Kids start by choosing a dinosaur line-art image and then enter the canvas area, where they can color the picture and freely paint in the background. The line-art can also be disabled, allowing children to draw on a blank canvas.

A wide selection of colors, brushes, and fill tool is available. The size of each drawing tool can be adjusted, and all buttons and tools can be hidden so only the drawing area remains visible.

It’s the perfect creative experience for young children to improve hand-eye coordination, explore colors, and enjoy a fun artistic journey with friendly dinosaurs.
